title: claytonia triangularis var. crassifolia
intro: Claytonia triangularis var. crassifolia, also known as broad-leaved miner's lettuce, is a variety of the Claytonia triangularis plant, a succulent herb that belongs to the Portulacaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of vitamins A, C, and E, as well as its mineral-rich properties. The health benefits of Claytonia triangularis var. crassifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve eye health, and support immune function, making it a valuable herb for maintaining overall well-being. Claytonia triangularis var. crassifolia can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or salve, and its leaves can also be added to salads or used as a cooking green, providing a nutritious and versatile addition to various dishes.
